title: crataegus sanguinea altaica
intro: Crataegus sanguinea altaica is a species of hawthorn tree, which is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Rosaceae. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, particularly quercetin and anthocyanins, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Crataegus sanguinea altaica has been traditionally used to support cardiovascular health, lower blood pressure, and improve lipid profiles, as well as exhibit antioxidant and anti-aging properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
